title: viola pusillima
intro: Viola pusillima, also known as small violet, is a small flowering plant belonging to the violet family (Violaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and soothing digestive issues. The health benefits of Viola pusillima include its antioxidant and antibacterial properties, which can help to protect against oxidative stress and infections. Viola pusillima is typically prepared as a tincture or tea, and can also be used in topical creams and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
